changes.description: Port graph data model: NodeLabel (10 types), RelType (11 types), GraphNode/GraphRelationship dataclasses with generate_id() and to_dict()
SQLite storage backend with WAL mode: nodes/relationships/file_hashes tables, upsert operations, callers/callees queries, confidence scoring, incremental file tracking
ContextGraph class skeleton with repo_path/.cnogo/graph.db storage, is_indexed() check, stub methods for index/query/impact/context, package-level exports
10 tests covering enums, ID generation, dataclass creation, serialization
20 tests covering initialization, node CRUD, relationship queries, file hash tracking, cascade removal
9 tests covering construction, db_path, is_indexed, stub methods, package exports
